title: lycioplesium obovatum
intro: Lycioplesium obovatum, also known as the "creeping lilyturf", is a type of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The medicinal properties of Lycioplesium obovatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lycioplesium obovatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
